actual_title: APIs, Interfaces, and Modular Computational Design

cards.title: Interface Contract
cards.governance_note: Define inputs, outputs, errors, side effects, permissions, and version guarantees.

cards.title: Schema Validation
cards.governance_note: Use validation rules, required fields, units, versions, and provenance.

cards.title: Compatibility Governance
cards.governance_note: Track consumers, breaking changes, migration plans, and deprecation timelines.
